response:
<<Ethics In Tech>>
Section 1
Microsoft aims for good.
Good means fair use.
Use data wisely.
Wise choices matter.
Matter to all.
All users deserve trust.
Trust builds strong bonds.
Bonds connect people.
People need safety.
Safety is key.

Section 2
AI must be safe.
Safe systems help.
Helping others matters.
Matters for society.
Society needs fairness.
Fairness guides design.
Design needs care.
Care prevents harm.
Harm hurts many.
Many lives depend.

Section 3
Depend on truth.
Truth requires facts.
Facts drive decisions.
Decisions shape future.
Future holds promise.
Promise needs action.
Action drives change.
Change improves lives.
Lives become better.
Better means progress.

Section 4
Progress needs rules.
Rules set limits.
Limits stop abuse.
Abuse breaks trust.
Trust fades fast.
Fast action helps.
Helps fix errors.
Errors cause pain.
Pain stops growth.
Growth needs care.

Section 5
Care for privacy.
Privacy protects rights.
Rights belong to all.
All deserve respect.
Respect builds confidence.
Confidence fuels innovation.
Innovation drives growth.
Growth creates jobs.
Jobs support families.
Families form communities.

Section 6
Communities need voice.
Voice gives power.
Power enables choice.
Choice defines freedom.
Freedom allows expression.
Expression sparks ideas.
Ideas solve problems.
Problems need solutions.
Solutions bring peace.
Peace fosters harmony.

Section 7
Harmony guides policy.
Policy sets standards.
Standards ensure quality.
Quality builds value.
Value creates wealth.
Wealth supports research.
Research finds cures.
Cures save lives.
Lives find hope.
Hope inspires dreams.

Section 8
Dreams shape vision.
Vision leads paths.
Paths guide steps.
Steps reach goals.
Goals define success.
Success means impact.
Impact changes world.
World needs light.
Light shows way.
Way leads forward.
